name: office managers in small accounting firms processing 5–15 petty cash transactions/week tool
description: For office managers in small accounting firms processing 5–15 petty cash transactions/week, manual reconciliation causes late reports and potential cash flow gaps. We automate reconciliation and reporting instead of manual tracking and reconciliation using spreadsheets.
target_audience: office managers in small accounting firms processing 5–15 petty cash transactions/week
problem_solved: manual reconciliation of petty cash accounts
features: weekly email reports to office managers

locked_fields.primary_user: office managers in small accounting firms processing 5–15 petty cash transactions/week
locked_fields.primary_problem: manual reconciliation of petty cash accounts
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For office managers in small accounting firms processing 5–15 petty cash transactions/week, manual reconciliation causes late reports and potential cash flow gaps. We automate reconciliation and reporting instead of manual tracking and reconciliation using spreadsheets.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual tracking and reconciliation using spreadsheets
must_have_features: weekly email reports to office managers

one_liner: For office managers in small accounting firms processing 5–15 petty cash transactions/week, manual reconciliation causes late reports and potential cash flow gaps. We automate reconciliation and reporting instead of manual tracking and reconciliation using spreadsheets.
